name: ask
description: Ask Molly anything about Whiteout Survival or any topic

options.name: question
options.description: Your question

name: refresh
description: Clears cached alliance data and reloads from Google Sheets.

name: reminder
description: Set a reminder with time and message

options.name: time
options.description: When to remind you (e.g., '5 minutes', 'tomorrow 3pm IST', 'daily at 9am')

options.name: message
options.description: Title/header for the reminder

options.name: channel
options.description: Channel to send reminder in

options.name: body
options.description: Optional detailed message body for the reminder

options.name: thumbnailimage_preset
options.description: Optional preset image to use as embed thumbnail

options.name: image_url
options.description: Optional direct image URL to use in the reminder embed

options.name: thumbnail_url
options.description: Optional image URL to use as embed.thumbnail (overrides preset)

options.name: footer_text
options.description: Optional footer text for the embed

options.name: footer_icon_url
options.description: Optional footer icon URL for the embed

options.name: author_url
options.description: Optional URL to link the author name to

name: giftcodesettings
description: Open interactive gift code settings dashboard for this server

options.name: prompt
options.description: Prompt of the image you want to generate

options.name: width
options.description: Width of the image (optional)

options.name: height
options.description: Height of the image (optional)

options.name: model
options.description: Model to use (optional)

options.name: enhance
options.description: Enable prompt enhancement (ignored)

options.name: safe
options.description: Safe for work (ignored)

options.name: cached
options.description: Use default seed / caching (ignored)

options.name: nologo
options.description: Remove logo (ignored)

options.name: private
options.description: Send result as ephemeral to only you

name: mostactive
description: Show the top 3 most active users and activity graph based on messages in the current month

name: dicebattle
description: Challenge someone to a dice battle

options.name: opponent
options.description: Member to challenge

name: register_view
description: Register a persistent view for an existing message (admin)

options.name: channel
options.description: Channel containing the message

options.name: message_id
options.description: The message ID to register

name: alliancemonitor
description: Alliance monitoring dashboard with quick access to all monitoring features

name: websearch
description: Search the web with powerful, organized results

options.name: query
options.description: Search query

options.name: max_results
options.description: Number of results (1-10)

options.name: region
options.description: Region code (e.g., us-en, uk-en, wt-wt for global)

options.name: safesearch
options.description: Safe search filter: off, moderate, or strict

name: playerinfo
description: Get player info by 9-digit player id. Accepts comma-separated list (max 30).

options.name: player_id
options.description: Single 9-digit id or comma-separated list of ids (max 30)

name: editplayerinfo
description: Update an existing playerinfo message with new player data.

options.name: message_id
options.description: The ID of the message to edit (must be in the current channel)

options.name: player_id
options.description: The new 9-digit player ID to fetch info for

name: event
description: Get information about Whiteout Survival events

options.name: event_name
options.description: Select an event to get more information

name: server_age
description: Check your server age and upcoming milestones

options.name: state_number
options.description: The state/server number (e.g., 3063)

options.name: days
options.description: Optional: Override calculated days (leave empty for live data)

name: personalisechat
description: Personalize your chat experience with the bot

name: syncdata
description: Synchronize data cache from remote source

options.name: opponent
options.description: Choose your opponent

options.name: opponent
options.description: Choose your opponent

name: voice_chat
description: Start voice conversation (type messages, bot responds with voice)

name: tts
description: 🔊 Speak text in voice channel using AI voice

options.name: text
options.description: The text you want the bot to speak

options.name: voice
options.description: Voice to use (optional: jenny, aria, guy, davis, sonia, ryan, natasha, neerja, prabhat)

options.name: voice
options.description: Voice name to set (leave empty to see available voices)

name: tts_stop
description: 🛑 Stop TTS playback and clear queue
